name: Wang Hao
nameEn: WANG HAO 路 Peak of Reverse Penhold 路 Three-time Olympic Runner-up

tags.text: 馃 Three-time Olympic Men's Singles Runner-up
馃弳 World Cup Singles Champion

timeline.subtitle: Athens Olympic First Silver
achievements: 馃 Athens Olympics Men's Singles Silver (lost to Ryu Seung-min in final)
馃搶 First Olympics, reached men's singles final

timeline.subtitle: First World Cup Title
achievements: 馃弳 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (first major singles title)

timeline.subtitle: Beijing Olympic Silver 路 World Cup Defense
achievements: 馃 Beijing Olympics Men's Singles Silver (lost to Ma Lin in final)
馃 Beijing Olympics Men's Team Gold
馃弳 Men's World Cup Singles Champion (successful defense, second title)

timeline.subtitle: Yokohama World Championships Triumph
achievements: 馃弳 Yokohama World Championships Men's Singles Champion (beat Wang Liqin in final)

timeline.subtitle: London Olympic Third Silver
achievements: 馃 London Olympics Men's Singles Silver (lost to Zhang Jike in final)
馃 London Olympics Men's Team Gold

timeline.subtitle: Retirement
achievements: 馃搶 Later became Bayi team head coach, mentored Fan Zhendong

achievements.title: 猸?Peak of Reverse Penhold
achievements.description: Wang Hao pushed the reverse penhold backhand technique to its peak, renowned for his backhand reverse penhold play. He reached three consecutive Olympic men's singles finals but unfortunately won silver each time. In 2009, he won the World Championships men's singles title at his peak. Together with Wang Liqin and Ma Lin, they formed the 'Two Wangs and One Ma' era.
